summary: Rust CLI/library that converts GitHub raw file and release asset URLs into supported proxy/CDN URL formats such as gh-proxy, xget, jsdelivr, statically, or native GitHub.
primary_use: Convert raw file URLs for accelerated download
Convert release asset URLs for accelerated download
Generate proxy URLs without manually rewriting GitHub paths
recommended_agent_usage: Use for release assets and raw/single-file downloads after normal GitHub URL is slow or blocked.
Use jsdelivr or statically only for file resources; they do not support release assets.
Use gh-proxy or xget style URLs for release assets when appropriate.
Do not convert private repository or token-bearing URLs for public proxy services.
capabilities: Can parse GitHub raw, blob, and release URLs
Usable as CLI or Rust library
limitations: Only GitHub URLs are supported for parsing
jsdelivr and statically do not support release assets
It converts URLs; it is not itself a downloading proxy service
security_notes: Treat generated public proxy URLs as public.
Do not include tokens, signed URLs, private repo paths, or credentials in converted URLs.
Prefer native GitHub for sensitive resources.
